packageRules.description: Logic App custom code projects should use .NET 8.
Disable updates for specific packages in Logic App custom code projects, because these require specific versions to match the Logic App runtime.
Microsoft.ApplicationInsights 3.0.0 depends on Microsoft.Extensions.Logging(.Abstractions) version 8.0.0, which is not supported in a Logic App custom code project.
Microsoft.Azure.Workflows.WebJobs.Tests.Extension version 1.0.2 and 1.0.3 have a bug that causes the unit tests for the Logic App Workflows to fail. See https://github.com/Azure/logicapps/issues/1529
